python.db_connection: Singleton pattern or connection pooling via Neon

javascript.standard: ES6+ (const/let, arrow functions, modules if needed)
javascript.dom_manipulation: Vanilla JS only (no jQuery, no frameworks)
javascript.state_management: Simple object-based state or localStorage for persistence

database_schema_guidelines.orm: Raw SQL or lightweight wrapper (avoid heavy ORMs for serverless)
database_schema_guidelines.migrations: Manual SQL scripts or Alembic if complex
database_schema_guidelines.connection_string: Use neon.tech serverless driver compatible string

security.secrets: Never commit .env, use Vercel Environment Variables
security.input_validation: Sanitize all inputs in Flask routes

performance.caching: Cache static assets via Vercel headers
performance.db_queries: Use prepared statements, index frequently queried columns

checklist_before_deploy: Verify DATABASE_URL is set in Vercel
Ensure requirements.txt is up to date
Check CORS settings for production domain
Validate JSON responses from API endpoints
